jcr:content.jcr:description: Meet the people powering AbbVie science. Explore our scientists, leaders, and R&D community.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Our People
jcr:content.pageTitle: Shaping the future of science, together

title.jcr:title: Shaping the future of science, together

text.text: This is a place for the bold and the brilliant to build dynamic careers. A place to co-create breakthroughs and sharpen each other’s ideas. With deep expertise and long-time leadership in our fields, we look to raise the bar, then redefine it.

title_copy_copy.jcr:title: Curiosity and collaboration at our core

text_copy_copy.text: Meet the scientists turning curiosity into medicines, working together across disciplines and pushing through challenges that aim to deliver breakthroughs that can change lives. See how Evan’s work in Operations is fueled by rigor and resolve to turn small insights into big breakthroughs.

video_copy_copy.title: Behind the Science with Evan Jian He

video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: Caro Park on the Culture of Pushing Boundaries
video_copy_copy_copy.transcript:
Caro Park on the Culture of Pushing Boundaries

Caro in Medical Affairs + Health Impact, Immunology explains how bold strategy, cross-functional collaboration and relentless focus on patients help shape AbbVie’s approach to scientific innovation.

video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: Jorge Zamudio on Pursuing Challenging Science for Patients
video_copy_copy_copy.transcript:
Jorge Zamudio on Pursuing Challenging Science for Patients

Jorge in Medical Affairs + Health Impact, Neuroscience reflects on the importance of failure – and persistence – in advancing discovery.

video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: In-Ho Song on shaping the future of medicine
video_copy_copy_copy.transcript:
In-Ho Song on Shaping the Future of Medicine 

In-Ho in Clinical Development, Immunology shares how staying true to purpose and leading with curiosity helps transform challenges into opportunities for progress.

Kim Gabourel on Overcoming Obstacles

Kim in Clinical Development Operations explains how a problem solving mindset helps tackle challenges and deliver new medicines.

quote.attributionTitle: Executive Vice President, Research & Development, Chief Scientific Officer, AbbVie
quote.quote: We can achieve more for patients when we are agile, bold and co-create the best solutions possible. When we do, we all win – because patients benefit.

text_copy.text: Discover our innovators and leaders. The bold and curious, who take on the toughest scientific challenges with proven expertise and an unmatched drive to expand what’s possible in science.

video_copy_copy_copy.description: Hear from scientists about what it takes to make  a breakthrough.
video_copy_copy_copy.descriptiveIframeTitle: Discovery Files: The Eureka Moment Behind a Scientific Discovery
video_copy_copy_copy.title: The eureka moment behind a scientific discovery

item_1759341157007.cq:panelTitle: What's it like to work for AbbVie R&D?
item_1759341157007.text: See our community. Working in AbbVie R&D means being part of a global community where science is sleeves-rolled-up and purpose-driven. Our culture encourages bold ideas, collaboration across disciplines and the persistence it takes to turn discovery into impact for patients.

item_1759341166926.cq:panelTitle: Who is on the R&D leadership team?
item_1759341166926.text: Meet our R&D leaders. AbbVie's R&D leaders combine deep scientific and medical expertise with vision and resolve. They set the course for our pipeline and guide teams that develop new medicines for patients worldwide.

item_1759341172358.cq:panelTitle: What research publications have AbbVie scientists contributed to?
item_1759341172358.text: Explore AbbVie’s research publications. Our science is recognized across the global research community through peer-reviewed publications, collaborations and presentations at leading scientific forums.

item_1759341175758.cq:panelTitle: How many scientists work at AbbVie?
item_1759341175758.text:
Thousands of AbbVie scientists worldwide contribute their expertise across the discovery, development, and delivery of medicines. Together, they form a diverse and dynamic team across R&D and operations.
Discover more key facts

item_1759341180543.text: See our global R&D locations. AbbVie's R&D network spans the globe, with major sites in the United States, Europe and Japan. These locations create an environment where collaboration thrives and innovation accelerates.

title.jcr:title: Bring your potential to where science meets purpose
